name: time_race_parallel_amplifier
description: First field-calibrated sample (2026-06-13 token incident shape). 40% usage in 30min looks fine alone, but 6 parallel agents amplify burn 6x -> projected exhaustion 8min vs 300min deadline = certain lockout. Deadline floor escalates to orange even though user picked save_time (-1) and task_mode=deadline (-1). route_to_secondary_pool (sonnet pool) wins because user_goal=save_time prefers fan-out over stop.
